title: calochortus umpquaensis subsp. umpquaensis
intro: Calochortus umpquaensis subsp. umpquaensis is a rare, endemic plant species, classified under the genus Calochortus, commonly known as the mariposa lily. The plant has been used by indigenous tribes for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calochortus umpquaensis subsp. umpquaensis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
